title: Don't Break Your Tools!
description: Prevents using items with low durability
body:
# Don't Break Your Tools!

**This is a quality of life mod for people who find it annoying to lose their tools just because they weren't paying attention. This isn't for everyone.**

### Features
- Prevents using items, breaking blocks, or attacking with an item on low durability (takes into account using multiple durability)

Check out my server tweaks mod [Super Recipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/super-recipes)
